description: Autonomous YOLO programming command that spawns Claude Code in a worktree with full hex context

specs.description: hex go accepts a prompt string and starts autonomous coding
specs.given: A hex project with composition root
specs.when: User runs: hex go 'add user authentication'
specs.then: Creates a worktree, spawns autonomous agent with the prompt, streams progress to terminal

specs.description: hex go creates an isolated worktree by default
specs.then: A new worktree is created at ../hex-go-<timestamp> with branch hex-go/<slug>

specs.description: hex go --yolo skips all confirmation prompts
specs.then: Automatically merges worktree to current branch without confirmation

specs.description: hex go --review pauses after each phase
specs.then: Pauses and asks for user approval before continuing

specs.description: hex go always runs validation judge before merge
specs.then: Validation judge runs first; merge only happens on PASS verdict

specs.description: hex go never merges on FAIL verdict
specs.then: Worktree is preserved (not cleaned up), user is informed of failures, no merge happens

specs.description: hex go injects hex context into the spawned agent
specs.given: A hex project with CLAUDE.md, ports, and secrets configured
specs.then: Agent receives: project CLAUDE.md, port interfaces summary, secrets access, hex architecture rules

specs.description: hex go without arguments shows usage help
hex go cleans up worktree after successful merge
specs.then: Worktree directory and branch are removed

specs.description: hex go resolves secrets for the agent
specs.then: Agent's environment includes resolved secrets (API keys available)
